name: Ground Beef Barbecue
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the meat in a slow cooker or skillet on medium heat.
2. Remove excess grease from the meat.
3. Transfer the cooking pot to the heating base, or move the meat to the slow cooker.
4. Add all remaining ingredients and stir well to blend.
5. Cover and cook at setting #3 (for West Bend Slow Cooker) or low in others for 6 - 8 hours.
6. Serve on buns or over hot dogs for chili dogs.
